title: Moderation update
body: We reviewed today’s high-severity reports and took action on two validated abusive accounts. spam_wave_42 was banned for phishing spam posted across multiple channels, and toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. We also reviewed a brigaded false-positive report involving core_maintainer and closed it with no enforcement. Related reports have been closed. Please continue reporting clear, evidence-backed abuse so we can act quickly and fairly.
